title: cissampelos orbiculata
intro: Cissampelos orbiculata, also known as the round-leaved Cissampelos, is a perennial climber native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Cissampelos orbiculata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, and its roots can be used to make capsules or tablets for oral administration.
